'''Mavikk Jumka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] gang member and criminal active during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
Mavikk Jumka was arrested sometime during or before [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] and sentenced to the [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]] prison facility to carry out his prison time. Jumka provided information to the authorities about his partners, resulting in the [[Outland Police Force]] issuing a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the Nikto's head and wishing him to die a terrible death. [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] encountered Jumka and shot him during the [[Oovo IV Uprising]], successfully collecting the bounty.<ref name="SWBH" />

==Appearances==
